title: passiflora pilosa subsp. dimidiata
intro: Passiflora pilosa subsp. dimidiata is a subspecies of Passiflora, a genus of flowering plants in the family Passifloraceae, commonly known as passionflowers. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Passiflora pilosa subsp. dimidiata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
